text: Thank you Iran
text_zh: 感谢伊朗

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Two of the measures mutually agreed upon between the parties have yet to be implemented: a ceasefire in Lebanon and the release of Iran’s blocked assets prior to the commencement of negotiations. These two matters must be fulfilled before negotiations begin.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：双方共同商定的两项措施尚未落实：黎巴嫩停火以及在谈判开始前释放伊朗被冻结的资产。这两件事必须在谈判开始前完成。

text: ❗️ A Hezbullah drone attack today severely injured one Jewish soldier and another soldier moderately. Hezbullah yesterday and today attacked the courtyards of serval Israeli army bases.
text_zh: ❗️ 今天真主党的一次无人机袭击导致一名犹太士兵重伤，另一名士兵中度受伤。真主党昨天和今天袭击了多个以色列军事基地的庭院。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Two of the measures mutually agreed upon between the parties have yet to be implemented: a ceasefire in Lebanon and the release of Iran’s blocked assets prior to the commencement of negotiations. These two matters must be fulfilled before negotiations begin.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：双方共同商定的两项措施尚未落实：黎巴嫩停火以及在谈判开始前释放伊朗被冻结的资产。这两件事必须在谈判开始前完成。

text: Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein (Quincy Institute) Americans still weigh Iran on events that happened 40 years ago - but can’t understand why Iranians might not trust a U.S. president. Trump left the nuclear deal, tried to negotiate again but bombed them. The Trump administration likes to conduct diplomacy while shooting. This isn’t how you conduct diplomacy. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 中东专家亚当·温斯坦（昆西研究所）：美国人仍然用40年前发生的事件来衡量伊朗，但无法理解为什么伊朗人可能不信任美国总统。特朗普退出了核协议，试图再次谈判，但随后轰炸了他们。特朗普政府喜欢在开火的同时进行外交。这不是进行外交的方式。完整采访

text: Open Source Intel A senior Iranian security official told Press TV that Israeli strikes on Beirut were halted under Iranian pressure, claiming the pause was made a condition for Israel’s participation in U.S.-led ceasefire talks. The official added that Iran’s delegation trip to Islamabad was delayed multiple times due to the situation in Lebanon, warning that continued attacks could have led to the collapse of the negotiations altogether. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位伊朗高级安全官员告诉新闻电视台（Press TV），以色列对贝鲁特的袭击是在伊朗的压力下停止的，并声称暂停袭击是以色列参加美国主导的停火谈判的条件。该官员补充说，由于黎巴嫩的局势，伊朗代表团前往伊斯兰堡的行程被多次推迟，并警告称，持续的袭击可能导致谈判彻底破裂。推文

text: Open Source Intel Meanwhile, Hezbollah has been firing rockets non stop at northern Israel today, and Launched heavy missiles at southern Israel and Tel Aviv last night. THIS IS A VERY BIG MISTAKE. VERY SIGNIFICANT 🔴 Senior Iranian security official to Press TV: Tehran says it forced Israel to halt strikes in Beirut, making it a condition for joining ceasefire talks with the U.S. Iran claims its delegation’s trip to Islamabad was delayed multiple times over continued attacks, warning the talks could be canceled entirely if strikes resumed. Message from Tehran: any renewed Israeli strikes in Beirut or Dahieh will immediately end negotiations. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：与此同时，真主党今天一直在向以色列北部发射火箭弹，昨晚还向以色列南部和特拉维夫发射了重型导弹。这是一个非常大的错误。非常重大 🔴 伊朗高级安全官员对新闻电视台表示：德黑兰称其迫使以色列停止了对贝鲁特的袭击，并将其作为加入与美国停火谈判的条件。伊朗声称其代表团前往伊斯兰堡的行程因持续的袭击而多次推迟，并警告称如果袭击恢复，谈判可能会完全取消。来自德黑兰的信息：任何针对贝鲁特或达希耶的以色列新袭击都将立即结束谈判。 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel VERY SIGNIFICANT 🔴 Senior Iranian security official to Press TV: Tehran says it forced Israel to halt strikes in Beirut, making it a condition for joining ceasefire talks with the U.S. Iran claims its delegation’s trip to Islamabad was delayed multiple times over continued attacks, warning the talks could be canceled entirely if strikes resumed. Message from Tehran: any renewed Israeli strikes in Beirut or Dahieh will immediately end negotiations. tweet

It's the most prominent of a series of corruption cases against top Defense Ministry officials. /122277 https://twitter.com/Mike_Eckel/status/2042583913625702440/photo/1 - Mike Eckel tweet

text: Open Source Intel More than 24 hours after Israel issued a fresh evacuation warning for Beirut’s southern suburbs, no strikes have followed, raising uncertainty on the ground. Reports also indicate that U.S. President Donald Trump urged Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to scale back operations in Lebanon to avoid jeopardising fragile ceasefire efforts with Iran. IDF issues urgent evacuation for southern Beirut suburbs as it strikes Hezbollah military targets. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042224135640621241/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：在以色列对贝鲁特南郊发出新的撤离警告24小时后，没有发生后续袭击，这增加了当地的不确定性。报告还指出，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普敦促总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡缩减在黎巴嫩的行动，以避免危及与伊朗脆弱的停火努力。以色列国防军在袭击真主党军事目标时对贝鲁特南郊发布了紧急撤离令。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042224135640621241/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV condemns Israel on strikes on Hezbollah in Lebanon: “Absurd and inhuman violence is spreading ferociously through the sacred places of the Christian East, profaned by the blasphemy of war and the brutality of business, with no regard for people’s lives, which are considered at most collateral damage of self-interest. But no gain can be worth the life of the weakest, children, or families. No cause can justify the shedding of innocent blood.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：教皇利奥十四世谴责以色列对黎巴嫩真主党的袭击：“荒谬和不人道的暴力正在基督教东方的圣地疯狂蔓延，这些地方被战争的亵渎和商业的残酷所玷污，完全不顾人们的生命，这些生命最多被视为自身利益的附带损害。但没有任何收益值得牺牲最弱者、儿童或家庭的生命。没有任何事业可以证明流无辜者的血是正当的。”推文

text: Open Source Intel European, Arab and Gulf states are pressing Israel to halt strikes on Beirut, a Western diplomat told AFP, following deadly attacks earlier in the week. “There is ongoing diplomatic pressure from European states, Gulf states and Egypt on Israel to prevent renewed Israeli airstrikes on Beirut after ‘Black Wednesday’,” the diplomat said. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位西方外交官告诉法新社，继本周早些时候发生致命袭击后，欧洲、阿拉伯和海湾国家正在向以色列施压，要求其停止对贝鲁特的袭击。这位外交官说：“欧洲国家、海湾国家和埃及正在对以色列进行持续的外交压力，以防止在‘黑色星期三’之后以色列再次对贝鲁特进行空袭。”推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 🇹🇷 Ynet : Senior Israeli officials said the outcome of the war with Iran is reducing the chances of normalisation and alliances between Israel and Gulf states. While security ties with the UAE were significantly strengthened, other Gulf states may now seek closer ties with Iran and Turkey out of necessity rather than preference. “The outcome is less favourable for now,” an Israeli official said. “In the Gulf, we come out weaker – except with the UAE.” UAE presidential adviser Anwar Gargash wrote that the country will review its regional and international relations and determine who can be relied upon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 🇹🇷 Ynet：以色列高级官员表示，与伊朗战争的结果正在降低以色列与海湾国家关系正常化和结盟的机会。虽然与阿联酋的安全关系得到了显著加强，但其他海湾国家现在可能出于必要而非偏好寻求与伊朗和土耳其建立更紧密的关系。一位以色列官员说：“目前结果不太有利。在海湾地区，我们变得更弱了——除了与阿联酋的关系。”阿联酋总统顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什写道，该国将审查其地区和国际关系，并确定谁是可以信赖的。@wfwitness

text: 🇪🇺 "We haven’t seen Gulf countries helping us with Russia... it can’t be only a one-way street." - Europe's Foreign Policy Embarrassment, Kaka Khallas. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇹 Iraqi Kurdistan Regional Government President Nechirvan Barzani in a interview with the Italian daily Corriere della Sera stated that there is no military solution to the Iran crisis and that diplomacy is the only way. “The regime has survived. Killing leaders does little – they are immediately replaced.” On Israel’s strikes in Lebanon, Barzani said: “It is a mistake. They should stop immediately to ensure the ceasefire holds. Israel is not only attacking Hezbollah but damaging the country’s infrastructure.” He stressed that Kurds do not want their territory used against neighbours: “We do not want to be part of this war.” Barzani thanked Italian troops who were evacuated from Erbil and expressed hope they will return soon to train Kurdish forces. He also noted that Iraqi authorities have not done enough to stop Iranian‑backed militia attacks on Kurdistan, with over 600 strikes on the KRI since the war began. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇹 伊拉克库尔德斯坦地区政府主席内奇尔万·巴尔扎尼在接受意大利《晚邮报》采访时表示，伊朗危机没有军事解决方案，外交是唯一的途径。“政权已经幸存下来。杀害领导人作用不大——他们会立即被取代。”关于以色列在黎巴嫩的袭击，巴尔扎尼说：“这是一个错误。他们应该立即停止，以确保停火得以维持。以色列不仅在攻击真主党，还在破坏该国的基础设施。”他强调，库尔德人不想让他们的领土被用来对付邻国：“我们不想参与这场战争。”巴尔扎尼感谢了从埃尔比勒撤离的意大利军队，并表示希望他们能很快回来训练库尔德部队。他还指出，伊拉克当局在阻止伊朗支持的民兵袭击库尔德斯坦方面做得不够，自战争开始以来，库尔德斯坦地区已遭受了600多次袭击。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah supporters have begun to gather around Central Beirut and the Government Headquarters in rejection of Direct negotiations with Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党支持者已开始聚集在贝鲁特市中心和政府总部周围，拒绝与以色列进行直接谈判。@wfwitness

text: ملخص الإعتداءات من الساعة ١٠ و نص صباحاً حتى الساعة الخامسة عصراً: الغارات الجوية: الشهابية جبال البطم (غارة مسيرة) بنت جبيل شقرا دبين النبطية الفوقا(غارة مسيرة) الشرقية(غارة مسيرة) دير قانون رأس العين(غارة مسيرة) جبشيت(غارة مسيرة) النميرية(غارة مسيرة) جباع المجادل(غارة مسيرة) المنصوري مجدلزون سحمر عين بعال(غارة مسيرة) قاقعية الجسر بيت ياحون دورس النبطية زبدين كفرجوز كفررمان بيت ياحون(غارة من مسيرة) يحمر الشقيف القنطرة خربة سلم القاسمية (غارة مسيرة) بين دير كيفا-برج قلاويه القصف المدفعي: يحمر الشقيف بلاط دبين ابل السقي الخيام القصير شمع بنت جبيل البازورية عين بعال صريفا
text_zh: 上午10:30至下午5:00的袭击总结：空袭：Shahabiya、Jabal al-Botm（无人机袭击）、Bint Jbeil、Shaqra、Dabin、Nabatieh al-Fawqa（无人机袭击）、Sharqiya（无人机袭击）、Deir Qanoun、Ras al-Ain（无人机袭击）、Jibchit（无人机袭击）、Namiriya（无人机袭击）、Jbaa、Majdal（无人机袭击）、Mansouri、Majdal Zoun、Sohmor、Ain Baal（无人机袭击）、Qaqiyat al-Jisr、Beit Yahoun、Douris、Nabatieh、Zebdine、Kfarjouz、Kfar Remman、Beit Yahoun（无人机袭击）、Yahmar al-Shaqif、Qantara、Khirbet Selm、Qasimiya（无人机袭击）、Deir Kifa-Borj Qalaway 之间。炮击：Yahmar al-Shaqif、Blat、Dabin、Ibl al-Saqi、Khiam、Qusayr、Shama、Bint Jbeil、Bazouriya、Ain Baal、Srifa

text: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remains restricted, with most recent crossings limited to Iran-linked vessels. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 通过霍尔木兹海峡的航运仍然受到限制，最近的通行大多仅限于与伊朗有关的船只。来源：彭博社

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 The IDF has bombed the vicinity of the saray in Nabatieh (a state institution) Reports of a massacre amount state security. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Preliminary reports that 8 state security officials have been killed in the Israeli attack on a governmental institution in Nabatieh, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列国防军轰炸了纳巴提耶（国家机构）的政府大楼附近。有关于国家安全部门大屠杀的报道。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 初步报告称，8名国家安全官员在以色列对黎巴嫩南部一个政府机构的袭击中丧生。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BBC : Pakistan is preparing to host US‑Iran peace talks in Islamabad after successfully brokering a two‑week ceasefire. The country has declared a two‑day holiday and has deployed around 10,000 security forces. Pakistan’s military chief, Field Marshal Asim Munir – described by U.S. President Trump as his “favourite field marshal” – led the reconciliation effort, having previously handed over the alleged mastermind of the 2021 Kabul airport bombing to the U.S. Pakistan has also signed a $500 million critical minerals deal and a cryptocurrency agreement linked to the Trump family. Pakistan has played its part, but a former ambassador noted: “You can take the horse to water, you can’t make it drink.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BBC：巴基斯坦在成功斡旋两周停火后，正准备在伊斯兰堡主办美伊和平谈判。该国宣布放假两天，并部署了约10,000名安全部队。巴基斯坦军事首长、陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔——被美国总统特朗普称为他“最喜欢的陆军元帅”——领导了和解努力，此前他曾将2021年喀布尔机场爆炸案的所谓主谋移交给美国。巴基斯坦还签署了一项5亿美元的关键矿产协议和一项与特朗普家族有关的加密货币协议。巴基斯坦发挥了作用，但一位前大使指出：“你可以把马牵到水边，但你不能强迫它喝水。”@wfwitness

text: 🇨🇳 🇰🇵 Chinese FM Wang Yi met with Kim Jong Un, General Secretary of the Workers’ Party of Korea and President of the State Affairs of the Democratic People’s Republic of Korea, in Pyongyang. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇰🇵 中国外交部长王毅在平壤会见了朝鲜劳动党总书记、朝鲜民主主义人民共和国国务委员长金正恩。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The U.S. is likely to extend a waiver allowing some sanctioned Russian oil purchases; the current 30-day waiver expires April 11. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 美国可能会延长一项允许购买部分受制裁俄罗斯石油的豁免；目前的30天豁免将于4月11日到期。来源：路透社

text: EU's Kaja Kallas: We haven’t seen Gulf countries helping us with Russia; it can’t be a one-way street.
text_zh: 欧盟的卡娅·卡拉斯：我们没有看到海湾国家在俄罗斯问题上帮助我们；这不能是单行道。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "almost all from South Africa," All where white lol
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“几乎全部来自南非，” 所有白人 lol

text: Since October 2025, the US has admitted 4,499 refugees—almost all from South Africa, with only three from Afghanistan. Source: BBC
text_zh: 自2025年10月以来，美国已接纳了4,499名难民——几乎全部来自南非，只有三名来自阿富汗。来源：BBC

text: EU's Kaja Kallas: We haven’t seen Gulf countries helping us with Russia; it can’t be a one-way street.
text_zh: 欧盟的卡娅·卡拉斯：我们没有看到海湾国家在俄罗斯问题上帮助我们；这不能是单行道。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Zionist Medic Reports: 17 Injured as Settler Bus Overturns on Highway 2 Near Netanya, Occupied Palestine
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 犹太复国主义医疗报告：一辆定居者巴士在被占领巴勒斯坦内坦亚附近的2号公路上翻车，造成17人受伤
